scope: Deprecation and compatibility inventory only; no entrypoints removed or behavior changed.

changed_files.change: Added canonical P4.6.5 deprecation and compatibility plan.

entrypoint_inventory.reason: FastAPI routes, response models, SQLite compatibility, runtime config, redaction, observability, and validators are contract-sensitive.
Referenced by API, P4 gate, docs, tests, workflow graph, and tool registry checks.
Risk semantics and schema fields are frozen.
P4 tests and docs verify RAG provides evidence but cannot modify core state fields.
README/docs still list it; ranking behavior must be snapshotted before replacement.
Manual experimental utility with optional vector deps; not part of current P4 gate path.
README, SFT docs, historical artifacts, and optional mode=sft path reference these.
README/docs/tests/artifacts reference these; gate artifact schemas remain acceptance evidence.
Used by docs, gates, reliability tests, and acceptance artifacts.
Useful for local validation and referenced by docs/artifacts; may be reorganized only after docs migrate.
Legacy CLI path remains available; no deletion in P4.
Legacy CLI path remains available; no deletion in P4.
Kept for historical comparison. app/chains/report_chain.py itself is not deprecated because graph fallback and tests still use its helpers.
Validation evidence and gate baselines; do not remove in P4.

compatibility_shims.reason: README/docs still list the legacy module; remove only after ranking snapshots and docs migration.
P4.6.4 consolidated the helper but preserved local call names.
Preserves old report-chain comparison path while graph mode is preferred.

deprecated_candidates.affects_gate: No direct P4 gate path; compileall still checks syntax.
deprecated_candidates.affects_tests: No direct unittest dependency found in current scan.
deprecated_candidates.suggested_deletion_condition: README/docs remove MVP CLI instructions; replacement demo path exists; one release passes without references.

deprecated_candidates.affects_gate: No direct P4 gate path; compileall still checks syntax.
deprecated_candidates.affects_tests: No direct unittest dependency found in current scan.
deprecated_candidates.suggested_deletion_condition: README/docs migrate to graph/API flow; stateful schemas proven unused outside legacy scripts; human approval.

deprecated_candidates.affects_gate: eval_report.py remains part of historical validation evidence; compileall checks syntax.
deprecated_candidates.affects_tests: Current graph tests import report_chain helpers, not the CLI itself.
deprecated_candidates.suggested_deletion_condition: Graph/API eval fully replaces legacy comparison; docs and historical reports stop instructing legacy mode.

archive_candidates.affects_tests: No direct unittest dependency found in current scan.
archive_candidates.archive_condition: Decide optional vector deps and move to documented experimental/tooling area with import-safe tests.

archive_candidates.affects_gate: Some scripts are indirectly represented in historical gate artifacts; compileall checks all scripts.
archive_candidates.affects_tests: Some behaviors are covered by script-focused tests or documented smoke commands.
archive_candidates.archive_condition: Create scripts/demo or docs-only runbook and keep backward-compatible shims for one release.

remove_later_candidates.affects_gate: No current P4 gate path, but RAG behavior is acceptance-sensitive.
remove_later_candidates.affects_tests: No direct current unittest import found; RAG tests cover newer path.
remove_later_candidates.suggested_deletion_condition: Snapshot current legacy ranking, migrate docs to bm25_retriever/hybrid_retriever, prove no artifact or README reference remains.

remove_later_candidates.affects_gate: No direct P4 gate path; compileall checks syntax.
remove_later_candidates.affects_tests: No direct unittest dependency found in current scan.
remove_later_candidates.suggested_deletion_condition: Deprecated notice shipped, docs migrated, zero references, and one full gate cycle after migration.

remove_later_candidates.affects_gate: No direct P4 gate path; compileall checks syntax.
remove_later_candidates.affects_tests: No direct unittest dependency found in current scan.
remove_later_candidates.suggested_deletion_condition: Deprecated notice shipped, docs migrated, zero references, and one full gate cycle after migration.

risky_do_not_touch: TurnOutput, RunState, and FinalReport fields and semantics
SQLite schema, schema metadata, and persistence compatibility
Risk rule IDs, keyword matching, negation behavior, and high-risk sticky behavior
P4 workflow adapter and graph behavior used by API and P4 gate
RAG evidence boundary fields: chief_complaint, duration, risk_status, risk_rule_ids
Tool registry names: risk_check_tool, rag_search_tool, report_safety_tool, export_report_tool, eval_case_tool
Gate runners and generated acceptance artifacts
Synthetic eval cases and replay artifacts under artifacts/
deletion_preconditions: Show zero references in README, docs, tests, scripts, app code, and acceptance artifacts.
Prove the item is absent from gate runners or provide a replacement gate assertion.
Prove full unittest, compileall, code-health gate, and P4 gate still pass.
Preserve fake, fallback, real, SFT, and RAG path separation.
For RAG cleanup, provide deterministic retrieval/ranking snapshots.
For legacy CLI cleanup, provide replacement runbook/docs and one release of compatibility notice.
Obtain explicit human approval in a later cleanup phase.
unchanged_contracts: FastAPI API contract and response body semantics
SQLite schema and historical session compatibility
known_cautions: Deprecated and remove_later statuses are planning labels only, not deletion approval.
Several compatibility paths are still referenced by docs, scripts, tests, or artifacts.
RAG legacy cleanup needs deterministic ranking snapshots first.
Artifacts remain acceptance evidence and were not pruned.

next_recommended_phase.name: P4.6.6 Encoding / Chinese Literal Stability
items: Inventory user-visible Chinese literals and known mojibake candidates.
Freeze output-sensitive strings through manifest and snapshot guidance.
Avoid broad text repair until product copy review and snapshot tests approve it.
